creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #7)
Yes, the fix has been committed on 2023-08-28 (de3e65c91a8), 2 days after the bug report had been created (and 1 month before comment 6 had been submitted with a patch).

The patch would no longer be required after the upgrade of zlib from 1.3 (which caused the unpatched configure script to fail) to 1.3.1 in all supported FreeBSD versions.

Thank you for reminding me that I had forgotten to close the PR.
